title: Source: MLS owners discuss Whitecaps relocation
summary: MLS owners discussed relocating the Vancouver Whitecaps to a new market in a recent subcommittee meeting. The potential move reflects ongoing strategic realignment within the league.
content: A subcommittee of MLS owners met earlier this month to explore shifting the Vancouver Whitecaps to a new market, a source confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息：MLS老板讨论温哥华白帽队搬迁
zh.summary: MLS老板在最近的小委员会会议中讨论了将温哥华白帽队搬迁到新市场的事宜。这一潜在举动反映了联盟内部正在进行的战略调整。

title: John Stones to leave Man City in summer
summary: Manchester City announced that defender John Stones will leave the club at the end of the season. Stones departs after a successful tenure as a key defensive player for the Premier League champions.
content: John Stones will leave Manchester City this summer, the club have announced.

zh.title: 斯通斯今夏将离开曼城
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特城宣布后卫约翰·斯通斯将在赛季结束时离开俱乐部。斯通斯在担任英超冠军的关键防线球员后将离队。

title: Banned Kompany backs Bayern '100%' vs. PSG
summary: Despite a suspension, Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany's strategic influence remains crucial as the team prepares for a Champions League match against PSG. His coaching impact is cited as key to Bayern's European campaign.
content: Vincent Kompany's influence as coach is a key reason Bayern Munich is in the

zh.title: 遭禁的孔帕尼'100%'支持拜仁对阵巴黎圣日耳曼
zh.summary: 尽管遭禁赛，拜仁慕尼黑主教练文森特·孔帕尼的战术影响力在球队准备与巴黎圣日耳曼进行欧冠比赛时仍然至关重要。他的执教影响被认为是拜仁欧洲赛事的关键。

title: Carrick: United shouldn't 'over celebrate' CL spot
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick warned against premature celebration after a 2-1 victory over Brentford secured a Champions League spot. The team faces continued challenges despite reaching Europe's elite competition.
content: Michael Carrick has said Manchester United should not "over celebrate" reaching the Champions League after the 2-1 win over Brentford put the club on the brink of a return to Europe's top competition.

zh.title: 卡里克：曼联不应"过度庆祝"欧冠席位
zh.summary: 曼联主教练迈克尔·卡里克在2:1击败布伦特福德获得欧冠席位后，警告球队不要过度庆祝。尽管进入欧洲顶级竞赛，球队仍面临持续的挑战。

title: Sources: NWSL board postpones calendar flip vote
summary: The NWSL Board of Governors postponed a scheduled vote on the league's potential calendar restructuring. The delay suggests ongoing deliberations about changes to the league's seasonal format.
content: The NWSL Board of Governors is postponing a vote on the league's potential calendar flip that was slated for this week's meeting, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：美职女足董事会推迟日历变更投票
zh.summary: 美职女足联赛董事会推迟了原定的联赛日历重组投票。这一延迟表明董事会正在就联赛赛季格式变更进行持续讨论。

title: NY mayor Mamdani announces free WC fan fests
summary: New York City announced free World Cup fan festivals to provide affordable access for soccer fans unable to afford match tickets. The initiative broadens World Cup participation across income levels.
content: New York City will hold a series of free events for soccer fans who hope to experience the excitement of the World Cup but can't the hefty prices for tickets to the matches, officials announced Monday.

zh.title: 纽约市长宣布免费世界杯球迷节
zh.summary: 纽约市宣布举办免费世界杯球迷节，为无法承担比赛门票的球迷提供经济实惠的参与途径。该举措扩大了世界杯在各收入阶层的参与度。

title: Luis Enrique says 'no team better' than PSG
summary: PSG manager Luis Enrique expressed confidence in his team's capabilities ahead of a Champions League clash with Bayern Munich. He insisted PSG has no equal among competitors entering the high-stakes encounter.
content: Luis Enrique insists "there's no team better than us" as he prepares Paris Saint-Germain for a heavyweight Champions League clash with Bayern Munich.

zh.title: 路易斯·恩里克：PSG无与伦比
zh.summary: PSG主教练路易斯·恩里克在与拜仁慕尼黑的欧冠对决前表达了对球队实力的信心，坚持认为PSG在竞争中无可匹敌。

title: ⚽ Tiny club's European run is miracle of season
summary: Rayo Vallecano, a modest club with minimal training facilities, is on the cusp of reaching a European final despite limited resources. Their unlikely run represents one of soccer's most inspiring underdog stories.
content: Rayo Vallecano, who train on a pitch that has potholes and play in a stadium where opponents mock the facilities, are on the cusp of a European final.

zh.title: ⚽ 小俱乐部的欧洲奇迹之旅
zh.summary: 资源匮乏、训练设施有限的小俱乐部拉约·瓦列卡诺即将闯入欧洲杯决赛，他们的奇迹之旅堪称足球界最鼓舞人心的黑马故事。

title: FIFA greenlights tailgating at World Cup venues
summary: FIFA approved tailgating activities at Gillette Stadium for World Cup games, enabling pre-match fan gatherings at the venue. The decision allows for extended festivities beyond stadium gates.
content: Tailgating will be allowed before FIFA World Cup games at Gillette Stadium, after all.

zh.title: FIFA批准世界杯场馆赛前停车场聚会
zh.summary: FIFA批准在吉列体育场举办的世界杯比赛中进行赛前停车场聚会，球迷可以在场馆停车场聚集。该决定允许在体育场外延长庆祝活动。

title: What if Liverpool didn't sign Mo Salah? Soccer's ultimate alternative history
summary: An analysis explores how Liverpool's nine-year trajectory would differ if Mohamed Salah had signed elsewhere instead of becoming one of the club's greatest players. The piece examines the counterfactual impact of one of soccer's most pivotal recent transfers.
content: Mohamed Salah will be remembered as one of the best Liverpool players of all time, but it's easy to forget that he almost didn't even end up at Liverpool. How would the last nine seasons have played out if he'd gone somewhere else?

zh.title: 如果利物浦没有签下萨拉赫？足球的终极另类历史
zh.summary: 一项分析探讨了如果穆罕默德·萨拉赫签到其他俱乐部而非成为利物浦历史上最伟大的球员之一，利物浦九年的轨迹会如何不同。这篇文章考察了足球最近一笔关键转会的反事实影响。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Alonso on three-man Chelsea manager shortlist
summary: Xabi Alonso is reportedly on Chelsea's shortlist for their next manager while Arsenal pursues striker Victor Osimhen in the transfer market. The report covers the latest managerial and player movement rumors.
content: Xabi Alonso is reportedly on Chelsea's shortlist to be their next manager, while Arsenal are interested in Victor Osimhen. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻、新闻：阿隆索入选切尔西主帅三人候选名单
zh.summary: 据报道，哈维·阿隆索位居切尔西下任主教练候选名单之中，与此同时阿森纳在转会市场上追求前锋维克托·奥西梅恩。该报告涵盖了最新的主教练和球员转会传闻。

title: 'I lived all my dreams' - Stones to leave Man City
summary: England defender John Stones confirmed he will leave Manchester City at season's end, reflecting on his successful and fulfilling tenure at the club. Stones expressed gratitude for achieving his dreams during his time with the Premier League champions.
content: England defender John Stones says he "lived all my dreams out" at Manchester City after confirming he will leave the club at the end of the season.

zh.title: "我实现了所有梦想"—斯通斯将离开曼城
zh.summary: 英格兰后卫约翰·斯通斯确认他将在赛季末离开曼城，并回顾了他在俱乐部取得的成功和充实的任期。斯通斯为在英超冠军效力期间实现梦想表示感谢。

title: Rangers have more chance of title than Celtic - Sutton
summary: Former Celtic striker Chris Sutton believes Rangers have a better chance of winning the Scottish Premiership than Celtic this season. The assessment challenges Celtic's perceived favorites status in the title race.
content: Former Celtic striker Chris Sutton believes arch-rivals Rangers have more chance of winning the Scottish Premiership this season than the Parkhead club.

zh.title: 苏顿：流浪者队比凯尔特人队更有机会赢得英超冠军
zh.summary: 前凯尔特人前锋克里斯·苏顿认为流浪者队在本赛季赢得苏格兰超级联赛冠军的机会比凯尔特人队更大。这一评估挑战了凯尔特人队在冠军争夺中的公认最爱地位。

title: Brighton plan Europe's first purpose-built women's stadium
summary: Brighton and Hove Albion released plans for Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium, representing a significant commitment to advancing women's sports infrastructure. The project underscores the club's dedication to professional women's soccer.
content: Brighton and Hove Albion release plans for Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium.

zh.title: 布莱顿计划建设欧洲首个专为女性足球设计的球场
zh.summary: 布莱顿和霍夫艾尔宾队发布了欧洲首个专为女性足球设计的球场计划，代表了在推进女性体育基础设施方面的重大承诺。该项目彰显了俱乐部对职业女性足球的致力。

title: World Cup kits for pets! Now you can dress your dog like Messi
summary: World Cup merchandise now includes pet kits, allowing fans to dress their dogs in matching gear featuring players like Messi. The quirky offerings extend World Cup support to four-legged companions.
content: If you're lucky enough to have a special four-legged friend in your life then you can both show support for your team this summer with matching kits.

zh.title: 宠物世界杯套装！现在你可以让你的狗穿上梅西同款
zh.summary: 世界杯商品现已推出宠物装备，让球迷能够为他们的狗穿上以梅西等球员为主题的同款服装。这些趣味产品将世界杯的支持扩展到了毛茸茸的同伴。

title: The tactical fluidity that makes PSG so impressive
summary: PSG's current squad demonstrates the club's most impressive football despite having fielded squads with bigger individual stars like Messi and Neymar. The focus on tactical cohesion over star power suggests a more balanced and effective approach.
content: Despite boasting squads that have included the likes of Lionel Messi, Neymar and Kylian Mbappe, it is the current Paris St-Germain side that is playing the club's most impressive football.

zh.title: 使PSG如此出色的战术灵活性
zh.summary: PSG现在的球队展现出俱乐部最令人印象深刻的足球表现，尽管曾经拥有梅西和内马尔这样的超级巨星。专注于战术凝聚力而非明星球员，表明了一种更加平衡和有效的方式。

title: Ranking the players who could decide the Champions League semi-finals
summary: An analysis ranks the 10 most influential players who could determine outcomes in the Champions League semi-finals. The ranking examines which elite performers have the potential to be most decisive for their respective teams.
content: Which players will prove key to their team’s chances in the Champions League last four? We've ranked the top 10.

zh.title: 排名可能决定欧冠半决赛的球员
zh.summary: 一项分析对可能决定欧冠半决赛结果的10名最具影响力的球员进行了排名。该排名评估了哪些精英球员有潜力对各自球队的比赛最具决定性。

title: Mac wants to 'earn' place in Wrexham history
summary: Wrexham co-owner Rob Mac is impressed by the Football Museum of Wales and wants to secure a dedicated section to cement his place in the club's history. The museum is set to open later this year.
content: TV star and Wrexham co-owner Rob Mac is impressed as he tours the Football Museum of Wales which opens later this year and wants own section.

zh.title: Mac想要在Wrexham历史上"赢得"一席之地
zh.summary: Wrexham共同所有人Rob Mac对威尔士足球博物馆印象深刻，并希望获得一个专门的展区来巩固他在俱乐部历史上的地位。博物馆定于今年晚些时候开放。
